name: Grill-Side Garden Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Frozen whole kernel corn, thawed
1 small Ripe avocado, peeled, seeded, and coarsely chopped
1/3 cup Thinly sliced green onions with tops
2 tbsp Chopped fresh cilantro or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine tomatoes, zucchini, corn, avocado, and green onions in a large bowl.
2. In a separate container, whisk together vegetable oil, Pace Picante Sauce, cilantro or parsley, lemon or lime juice, garlic salt, and ground cumin until well mixed.
3. Pour the dressing over the vegetable mixture and gently stir to combine with the vegetables.
4. Chill for 3-4 hours, stirring occasionally.
5. Serve chilled or at room temperature with additional Pace Picante Sauce on top.
Makes about 4 cups salad.
NOTE: One cup cooked fresh corn kernels or one can (8.75 oz) whole kernel corn, drained, may be substituted for frozen corn.
